title: Badge component with variant and size styling
purpose: Provides a reusable badge UI element that supports different visual variants and sizing options for displaying short labels or tags.
module_context: Exports a Badge component with defined props interface and CSS class mappings for different variants and sizes.

steps.content: Accept text content and optional styling props for variant and size.
Apply default variant and size values if not provided.
Construct a span element with combined CSS classes for styling.
Render the provided text content inside the styled span.
